modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: NOAH cannot connect to the network database.

full_description_text:  
The user reported that NOAH is unable to connect to the network database. They mentioned that the modules are loading slowly or timing out. This issue is affecting their ability to use the system effectively.
short_description: NOAH cannot connect to the network database.
description: The user reported that NOAH is unable to connect to the network database. They mentioned that the modules are loading slowly or timing out. This issue is affecting their ability to use the system effectively.
